title: ricinocarpus senilis
intro: Ricinocarpus senilis, also known as the White Horse-Senile, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin ailments. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus senilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to relieve pain and promote wound healing. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
